parameters.customBody: ={{ (function(){ var p=$('Armar plan de corrida').first().json; var d=Number(p.max_dias_recencia||0); var b={ directUrls: p.ig_urls, resultsType: 'posts', resultsLimit: $('Config').first().json.ig_results_limit, searchType: 'user', searchLimit: 1, addParentData: true }; if(d>0) b.onlyPostsNewerThan = d + ' days'; return b; })() }}
={{ { hashtags: $('Armar plan de corrida').first().json.tt_hashtags, resultsPerPage: $('Config').first().json.tt_results_limit, shouldDownloadVideos: false, shouldDownloadCovers: false } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.item.json;
const seguidores = item.ownerFollowersCount || item.ownerFollowerCount || 0;
return { json: {
  plataforma: 'instagram',
  external_id: String(item.id || item.shortCode || item.shortcode || ''),
  username: item.ownerUsername || '',
  nombre: item.ownerFullName || '',
  seguidores,
  bio: item.ownerBio || '',
  descripcion: item.caption || '',
  likes: item.likesCount || 0,
  comentarios: item.commentsCount || 0,
  reproducciones: item.videoViewCount || 0,
  url: item.url || '',
  video_url: item.url || '',
  thumbnail_url: item.displayUrl || '',
  hashtags: (item.hashtags || []).join(', '),
  duracion_video: item.videoDuration || 0,
  engagement_rate: seguidores > 0 ? (((item.likesCount || 0) + (item.commentsCount || 0)) / seguidores * 100).toFixed(2) : '0',
  fecha_publicacion: (function(){ var d = new Date(item.timestamp); return isNaN(d.getTime()) ? '' : d.toISOString().split('T')[0]; })()
} };

const item = $input.item.json;
const am = item.authorMeta || {};
const seguidores = am.fans || 0;
return { json: {
  plataforma: 'tiktok',
  external_id: String(item.id || ''),
  username: am.name || '',
  nombre: am.nickName || '',
  seguidores,
  bio: am.signature || '',
  descripcion: item.text || item.desc || '',
  likes: item.diggCount || 0,
  comentarios: item.commentCount || 0,
  reproducciones: item.playCount || 0,
  url: item.webVideoUrl || '',
  video_url: item.webVideoUrl || '',
  thumbnail_url: (item.videoMeta && item.videoMeta.coverUrl) || '',
  hashtags: (item.hashtags || []).map(function (h) { return h.name || h; }).join(', '),
  duracion_video: item.videoMeta ? (item.videoMeta.duration || 0) : 0,
  engagement_rate: seguidores > 0 ? (((item.diggCount || 0) + (item.commentCount || 0)) / seguidores * 100).toFixed(2) : '0',
  fecha_publicacion: item.createTimeISO ? item.createTimeISO.split('T')[0] : ''
} };

nodes.name: Pre-trim relevancia
nodes.notes: Haiku LAXO sobre el caption: descarta off-topic obvio antes de transcribir. Fail-open. Lee criterios_relevancia del Proyecto/Voz vía 'Armar plan'. ADR-010 / Stage 2.

nodes.name: Transcribir (Supadata)
nodes.notes: Supadata vía this.helpers.httpRequest. external_id atado al item (mata #8 merge-by-position). lang de Supadata primario, fallback sobre el transcript (mata #7). Fail-open.

nodes.name: Traducir (Claude Haiku)
nodes.notes: Haiku 4.5 traductor literal vía this.helpers.httpRequest, SOLO si el original no está en español. external_id atado al item. Fail-open: script = transcript si falla.

nodes.name: Gate de relevancia
nodes.notes: Jurado ESTRICTO Haiku sobre el transcript (etapa CALIDAD, ADR-010). Dropea irrelevantes; heat_score = composite semántico⊕métrico (peso_relevancia). Fail-open. Stage 3.
